# Jeff Dean on building intelligent systems with large scale deep learning

by Jeff Dean

[](https://account.ycombinator.com/?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ycombinator.com%2Flibrary%2F5j-jeff-dean-on-building-intelligent-systems-with-large-scale-deep-learning)

56K views

Over 1 year ago

Jeff Dean is a Google Senior Fellow in the Research Group, where he leads the Google Brain project.

He spoke to the [YC AI](https://blog.ycombinator.com/yc-ai/) group this summer. Here are his slides:

Convincing engineers to join your team Harj Taggar Once you've found an engineer you want to hire, the final step is presenting them an offer to join your team and convincing them to accept it. This is advice for increasing the percentage of the offers you make that are accepted.
